title: cardamine microphylla
intro: Cardamine microphylla, also known as small-flowered bittercress or tiny bittercress, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cardamine microphylla include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
